pages.text: $(o)"Lord, cast Thy gaze here. Let the rot in shadow find no shadow left."$()$(br2)Liturgy of the Dawn Order, recited at fog-break to unseal this scroll.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)14 blocks$() of the core, all hostiles take $(l)20 magic damage$(). $(br2)$(l)Undead$() are additionally ignited for $(l)8 seconds$() — judgement-fire is not quenched by water.$(br2)Cost: $(l)2400$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Excellent for night sieges and Nether Fortress sweeps.$(br2)Fixed damage doesn't scale — limited Boss value.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 2 Wellspring$() or above.
